title: Wanderer Scout Surveyor

{{Quote|I used to have a Wanderer, but I didn't keep it around for long. While there was no problem with the droid's ability (it is a superior performer), I prefer units with more "personality" than it exhibited.|[[Zeb (Cynabar's Droid Datalog)|Zeb]]|<ref name="CFTD" />}}
The '''Wanderer Scout Surveyor''' was a model of [[Survey droid/Legends|survey droid]] manufactured by [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]]. They were often deployed with [[87-RM Scout Collector]]s to capture and examine animals.

==Characteristics==
The Wanderer had an [[Spider/Legends|arachnoid]] design, with a round body supported by eight multi-jointed [[Limb/Legends|legs]] providing the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] with mobility. The body was a [[Meter/Legends|meter]] in diameter, and the droid stood two meters tall.<ref name="CFTD" /> The droid was fast and agile.<ref name="EGTD">''[[The Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref>

A single [[Photoreceptor/Legends|photoreceptor eye]] was mounted on top of the body, and could rotate three-hundred and sixty degrees. [[Sensor/Legends|Sensor]] apparatus was mounted on the underside of the body.<ref name="CFTD" /> They were also equipped with a [[Hypersonic Communications Console]] that allowed them to communicate with other Wanderer units.<ref name="EGTD" />

The Wanderer was armed with a [[Stun blaster/Legends|stun blaster]] to subdue specimens.<ref name="CFTD" /> The stun blaster was mounted on the same housing as the photoreceptor, allowing the droid to essentially shoot whatever it could see.<ref name="EGTD" /> Below the primary sensor array were three [[Manipulator arm/Legends|fine manipulators]]<ref name="CFTD" /> equipped with grasping claws and surgical tools to dissect specimens in the field.<ref name="TUR" />

The Wanderer did not come equipped with a [[Personality matrix/Legends|personality matrix]],<ref name="CFTD" /> leaving many owners frustrated over the lack of a personality.<ref name="TUR" /> Due to the droid's extensive scouting and medical protocols being given priority, owners of Wanderers had to get rid of those subroutines if they wanted to reprogram their droid.<ref name="CFTD" /> If they did not, Wanderers would ignore the new personality matrix and continue to function as usual.<ref name="TUR" />

Wanderers were capable of understand both [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] and [[Binary/Legends|Binary]], but could only speak the latter.<ref name="TUR" />

==Role==
[[File:Wanderer_Scout_Surveyor_EGTD.png|thumb|left|150px|A Wanderer Scout Surveyor droid]]
The Wanderer Scout Survey Droid was designed for [[Scout/Legends|scouting missions]]<ref name="CFTD" /> and was often marketed alongside the [[87-RM Scout Collector]]<ref name="EGTD" /> to capture and subdue specimens for live study.<ref name="CFTD" />

The Wanderers were usually deployed in packs, communicating with each other using hypersonic frequencies. In coordinated actions, one unit would flush a target from cover to allow a second unit to stun it.<ref name="EGTD" />

==History==
The Wanderer Scout Surveyor was manufactured by [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]].<ref name="CFTD" /> The design was taken from blueprints created by an extinct alien race. In sales catalogues, it was often packaged alongside the 87-RM Scout Collector.<ref name="EGTD" />

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], sixteen units roamed the jungles of [[Orellon II]]. The local [[Kentra]] thought they were [[Voontragi|demons]], and when a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] landed on Orellon II, the Kentra [[King/Legends|King]] [[Jerius]] send them to stop the demon threat.<ref name="J2">{{JournalCite|2|The Prophecy}}</ref>
